image_source.reason: Repository does not provide Dockerfile, using official Ubuntu image as base

readme.summary: HCOMM (Huawei Communication) is HCCL's communication base library, providing communication domain and resource management capabilities. Supports multiple communication engines and protocols (PCIe, HCCS, RDMA).

build_docs.summary: Provides build instructions, dependencies, and build methods. Requires CANN toolkit package for full compilation.

build_script.summary: Main build script supporting multiple build modes: host package, host+device package, unit tests, etc.

value: CANN Toolkit Package (required for full compilation)

container_image.note: Third-party Dockerfiles found in boost directory, but not for project itself

execution_log.output: Container started successfully with ID: d4416c40ab24

execution_log.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip gcc g++ cmake pkg-config
execution_log.output: All dependencies installed successfully. gcc version: 13.3.0, cmake version: 3.28.3, python version: 3.12.3
CMake configuration completed successfully. Third-party dependencies (OpenSSL, rdma-core, json, hcomm_utils, etc.) were found or downloaded automatically. Build files generated in /workspace/build.

execution_log.error: Multiple missing header files: dlog_pub.h, securec.h, ascend_hal_external.h, ascend_hal.h, hccl_msg.h. Also missing ccec compiler: /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/tools/ccec_compiler/bin/ccec: not found
CMake script error in hcomm_utils.cmake line 107: if given arguments: STREQUAL device. Variable PRODUCT_SIDE not properly expanded in string comparison.

process_timeline.action: Reading README, build documentation, and build scripts

artifacts: stub libraries: libascend_hal.so, libslog.so, libaicpu_sharder.so, libc_sec.so, libunified_dlog.so, libmmpa.so, libascendcl.so, libtsdclient.so, libruntime.so, libacl_rt.so, libmetadef.so, libopp_registry.so, liberror_manager.so
build.failure_point: Missing header files from CANN toolkit package and missing ccec compiler

ut.reason: CMake configuration failed for UT build due to script error in hcomm_utils.cmake

sample.reason: Requires CANN runtime environment and Ascend hardware which is not available in the verification container

documentation_gaps.description: Repository does not provide a Dockerfile for build environment setup. Users need to set up environment manually.

documentation_gaps.gap: CANN toolkit dependency not clearly documented
documentation_gaps.description: Build requires CANN toolkit package (ccec compiler, header files) which is not open source. This dependency should be more prominently documented.
Required header files (dlog_pub.h, securec.h, ascend_hal_external.h, etc.) are not included in the repository and need to be obtained from CANN toolkit.
hcomm_utils.cmake line 107 has variable comparison issue that can fail under certain conditions.

problems_encountered.solution: Install CANN toolkit package which provides this compiler. Note: ccec is a proprietary compiler for Ascend chips.

problems_encountered.problem: Missing header files (dlog_pub.h, securec.h, ascend_hal_external.h, ascend_hal.h, hccl_msg.h)
problems_encountered.solution: These headers are part of the CANN toolkit package. Install the CANN toolkit to /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/
problems_encountered.source: Compilation errors in multiple source files

problems_encountered.problem: CMake script variable comparison issue in hcomm_utils.cmake:107
problems_encountered.solution: Fix the if statement to use proper variable quoting: if("${PRODUCT_SIDE}" STREQUAL "device") instead of if(${PRODUCT_SIDE} STREQUAL "device")

conclusions.buildable_without_cann: Partial build is possible (stub libraries compile successfully at ~3%)
full_build_requirements: Ascend hardware recommended for complete functionality validation
conclusions.overall_assessment: Repository structure is well-organized, build system is comprehensive. However, successful compilation requires proprietary CANN toolkit components which are not included in the open-source repository.
recommendations: Provide a Dockerfile with pre-configured build environment
Clearly document CANN toolkit version requirements
Consider adding build mode that skips device-specific components
Fix CMake variable comparison issue in hcomm_utils.cmake
